title: Thrawn's fleet (Galactic Empire)
content:
{{Top|canon=Seventh Fleet (Galactic Empire)}} {{Otheruses|Thrawn's fleet}} {{Citation}} {{Fleet |image=[[File:ThrawnFleet.jpg]] |name=Thrawn's fleet |type= |founder=[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] |founded=[[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], soon after the [[attack on the Red City]] |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved=[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] |restored= |headquarter= |location=Throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] |commander=*[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] *[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] |officers= *[[General/Legends|General]] [[Freja Covell]] *Captain [[Aban]] *Captain [[Brandei]] *Captain [[Harbid]] *Captain [[Dorja]] *Captain [[Tomax Bren/Legends|Tomax Bren]] *[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[TC-1289]] *[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Molo Himron]] *Major [[Grodin Tierce (clone)|TR-889]] |crew= *Lieutenant [[Dezon]] *Lieutenant [[Tschel]] *Lieutenant [[Creb]] *[[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Rejlii Mithel]] |flagship=[[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] |capital= *[[Inexorable (Imperial I-class)|''Inexorable'']] *''[[Death's Head]]'' *''[[Stormhawk (Imperial I-class)|Stormhawk]]'' *''[[Nemesis]]'' *[[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator '']] *[[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']] |starfighters=*[[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]] *[[Black Wing Squadron]] *[[Cloak Force]] *[[Scimitar assault wing]] |ground=*[[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] {{C|Remnants}} *[[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]] *[[Streen Squad]] *[[Brantz Squad]] *[[Arati Squad]] *[[Danex Squad]] *[[Thent Squad]] |naval=[[Katana fleet|''Katana'' Fleet]] |campaigns=*[[Thrawn campaign]] *[[Operation Shadow Hand]] |battles= |affiliation= *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Thrawn's confederation|Thrawn's Confederation]] }} {{Quote|The Chimaera is fully at your command, Admiral.''"
"''Then prepare the fleet for hyperspace. And for battle.|Captain Gilad Pellaeon and Grand Admiral Thrawn|''[[The Last Command]]''}} After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], with the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] went into chaos. [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admirals]], and [[General/Legends|Generals]] became [[Warlord/Legends|warlords]] and carved their own [[Pentastar Alignment|territory]] and [[Eriadu Authority|made]] [[Zsinj's Empire|their]] own [[Zero Command|splinter]] [[Greater Maldrood|kingdoms]]. The [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial war machine]] was disabled, with all of the warlords seizing whatever resources they could get their hands on. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], one of the last of the Grand Admirals, returned from his adventure in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], maintaining the [[Empire of the Hand]]. Thrawn was able to gather up a large [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] that could [[Thrawn campaign|threaten]] the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. With the New Republic's [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|capture of]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Thrawn would be elected [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander of the Imperial Fleet]] by the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] on [[Orinda/Legends|Orinda]]. The fleet would participate in many battles. Notably when Thrawn [[Battle of Sluis Van|attacked]] the [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]] [[Sluis Van Shipyards|shipyards]], and up until the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of]] [[Bilbringi]], which culminated in the death of Thrawn. The remains of the fleet would flee to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], where Thrawn's protégé, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] would take [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]]. During [[Operation Shadow Hand]], with the resurrection of Palpatine, the fleet, still underneath the command of Pellaeon, would be ordered to [[Capture of Duro|capture]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]; there, much of the fleet would be destroyed. ==History== ===Beginnings=== Roughly five years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Battle where the Empire had been defeated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] killed, Thrawn returned from the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] of the galaxy. On his return from the Unknown Regions, for the second time in his life, Grand Admiral Thrawn was a high ranking officer of the Imperial military, holding the position of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]]. Described by such historians as the young [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] history student [[Pollo Tipn]] as one of the most capable and cunning soldiers the Emperor commanded, Thrawn's tactical abilities saw him rise to the position of Grand Admiral despite being a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]], and despite the Emperor's [[Speciesism|xenophobia]]. Having had command of ships prior to the Battle of Endor, as a Grand Admiral, the defeat and scattering of the Empire saw Thrawn's access to a large fleet removed. Thrawn, however, still attempted to retain a number of ships, and to ensure he was able to take control of the [[Imperial Remnant]], the Remnant of the Empire, as Grand Admiral and leader. Despite the fact that a number of commanders and warlords considered themselves above him in terms of importance, tactical prowess and ability, Thrawn was able to gather a fleet small in comparison with that of the Empire prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], however large enough so as to be regarded as the new leader of the Empire, accepted by the [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]], the governor's of Imperial sectors, and the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Ruling Council]], the Council composed of numerous [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisors]]. The core of Thrawn's fleet, which he was beginning to build, was his personal armada, built around his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] and five other [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]. ===Beginning the offensive=== The first beginnings of the campaign involved a number of Imperial missions to the planet [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]], to capture the pregnant [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], the sister of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and a member of the ruling body of the New Republic at the time, the [[New Republic Provisional Council|Provisional Council]]. Thrawn, unknown in both name and position to the New Republic at the time, began mobilizing the Imperial Remnant, and his fleet. The first combat a member ship of Thrawn's fleet saw was on the planet [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]], where the [[Judicator/Legends|''Judicator'']] attacked the mobile mining facility, [[Nomad City]]. This facility was owned by the human [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], friend to Organa Solo and a former [[General/Legends|General]] in the Rebel Alliance during the Battle of Endor. During the [[Raid on Nomad City]], the outpost was raided and the Empire stole fifty-one [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner|mole miners]], large mining devices. Criminal boss [[Talon Karrde]] rescued Luke Skywalker from searching Imperial forces, before subduing him and imprisoning him in their base on the planet [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], husband of Leia and former criminal, and Lando Calrissian attempted to find Karrde, and were tipped off by a member of his organization as to the location of the base on Myrkr. After Skywalker's escape from his imprisonment, the ''Chimaera'' came out of orbit above the planet at the same time that a member of Karrde's organization gave pursuit. Landing craft were dispatched by the ''Chimaera'' to Karrde's camp. Patrols were sent to capture Luke Skywalker and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], member of Karrde's group. Planning from Karrde's group, Han and Lando allowed Skywalker and Jade to be rescued, the Empire and the ''Chimaera'' not taking them prisoner. [[File:Chimaera.jpg|thumb|left|200px|''Chimaera'', flagship of Thrawn's fleet.]] The next time the fleet saw action was in the first major battle of Thrawn's campaign, the [[Battle of Sluis Van|raid]] on the planet [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]], in an attempt to gain a number of ships for his cause. Using a cloaking device from the Empire's [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|private storehouse]] on the planet [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]], Thrawn cloaked his warships and the mole miners stolen from Nkllon and infiltrated the shipyard. Using the mole miners to burn into the command centers of the ships, Thrawn would have been able to steal the entire fleet from the New Republic, however Calrissian activated the mole miners thrusters, using a control code, to render the ships Thrawn was trying to steal inoperable. Of Thrawn's fleet, five of the six Imperial Star Destroyers were present at the battle. The ship missing from the engagement was the ''Judicator'', being refitted after the strike on Nkllon. These five ships were supported by a close support squadron of twelve [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruisers]], and a picket line of twenty-two [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]], with thirty TIE squadrons deployed in the fighter screen. ===The main offensive=== After the Battle of Sluis Van, Han Solo discovered former Rebel General [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] and his private militia. Part of the ships in Bel Iblis' militia were made up of those from the [[Katana fleet|''Katana'' fleet]], a fleet of ships supposedly lost for some time. The Empire, however, wished to expand their ships, as Thrawn had procured the technology to be able to grow clones. Needing ships to be crewed by the clones, Thrawn jumped at the chance to gain such ships. Reaching the man who knew the location of the ships, [[Hoffner]], first, the Empire were able to make their way to the location of the ''Katana'' fleet. The New Republic, however, eventually learnt of the location, and so were able to reach the location too. Finding the Empire already there, the [[Battle for the Katana fleet|Battle for the ''Katana'' fleet]] ensued, with the ''Judicator'' participating as part of Thrawn's personal Armada, in addition to the ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer ''[[Peremptory]]''. With the Empire's benefit of having reached their first, they managed to move most of the ships before the New Republic had arrived. The New Republic's tactical victory saw the ''Judicator'', in terms of Thrawn's personal armada, driven off, and the ''Peremptory'' destroyed. This saw Thrawn's fleet expanded, allowing the incoming clones to have a great deal of ships they were able to crew. With these new ships, Thrawn stepped up his campaign a gear, launching a three pronged attack on the planets [[Crondre]], [[Ando/Legends|Ando]], [[Filve]] and [[Ord Pardron/Legends|Ord Pardron]]. A great majority of the ships in Thrawn's fleet participated, the ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer [[Bellicose (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Bellicose'']] attacking Ando, Filve being attacked by the ''Judicator'' and Crondre by the ''[[Nemesis]]'', an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer from Thrawn's personal Armada. Thrawn's flagship, the ''Chimaera'', attacked the planet [[Ukio/Legends|Ukio]], in addition to the attack. With the main aim of the three pronged attack being to exhaust the New Republic base on Ord Pardron, so it could be easily taken, the attacks were a success. Insane clone of a long dead [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Joruus C'baoth]], had been calling for Thrawn to capture Leia Organa Solo and her unborn twins for him so he could "train" them. After a strike team sent to the New Republic capital of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] failed, Thrawn agreed to take the fleet there in person. Launching an [[Battle of Ord Mantell (9 ABY)|attack]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] to ensure the Republic failed to anticipate the attack on Coruscant, Thrawn took the ''Chimaera'' and another ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer in his personal Armada to Coruscant. In addition to the other ships, this made a strong attack force on the New Republic capital. Laying siege to Coruscant, using asteroids orbiting the planet to stop ships daring to enter or leave, Thrawn and his fleet were able to cut off Coruscant from the rest of the galaxy. Having launched a successful [[Destruction of Nomad City|second attack]] on Calrissian's Nomad City, [[Fall of Generis|attack on]] [[Generis/Legends|Generis]] and on [[Battle of Xa Fel (9 ABY)|Xa Fel]], the next major battle was the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]]. All of Thrawn's personal Armada participated in this battle, in addition to the two [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruisers]] [[Sentinel (Interdictor cruiser)|''Sentinel'']] and [[Constrainer/Legends|''Constrainer'']]. Despite, at first, the battle seemingly going well for the Empire, it soon turned around. The assassination of Thrawn at the hands of his [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguard [[Rukh/Legends|Rukh]] saw the Empire leaderless, and Thrawn's second in command, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], gave the order to retreat. This saw the end of the Thrawn campaign, with the ''Chimaera'', the former flagship, now being under the control of Pellaeon. ==Key ships of the fleet== ===Thrawn's personal armada=== Thrawn's personal armada consisted of six ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers. The first, ''Chimaera'', was the flagship and prime ship of Thrawn's personal armada and, indeed, Thrawn's fleet in general. Commanded by Thrawn himself, with Pellaeon as his deputy, the ''Chimaera'' saw action in numerous battles of the campaign. ''Death's Head'', under the command of Imperial Captain [[Harbid]], saw action at such battles as the assault on the New Republic base of Ord Pardron, the Siege of Coruscant and the Battle of Bilbringi, where it made its last appearance. The third ship in Thrawn's personal armada, ''Inexorable'', saw action at the battles of [[Attack on Bpfassh|Bpfassh]], Sluis Van and Bilbringi. The Captain of the ''Inexorable'' wasn't known. The fourth ship in the fleet, ''Judicator'', was under the command of Captain [[Brandei]], and saw action in three battles of the campaign. Having been one of the only ships in Thrawn's personal armada to have seen action at the Battle of Endor, ''Judicator'' first saw action under Thrawn with the attack on Nomad City. ''Judicator'' was also present at the Battle for the ''Katana'' fleet, where Captain Brandei became incensed at the New Republic for the destruction of the ''Peremptory''. The final battle ''Judicator'' saw in the campaign was, like many of the fleet, the Battle of Bilbringi. The penultimate ship in Thrawn's personal armada, the ''Nemesis'', saw action only at Sluis Van and Bilbringi. The final ship in Thrawn's personal armada, the ''Stormhawk'', saw action in exactly the same battles as the ''Nemesis''. ===Other ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers=== Three other ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers were part of the main fleet yet not of Thrawn's personal armada. The first, the ''Bellicose'', was Captained by Imperial captain [[Aban]]. The three pronged attack on Ukio saw the ''Bellicose'' strike at the world of Filve. The second ship in such a category was the ''Peremptory''. It was destroyed by Han Solo in the battle for the ''Katana'' fleet. The final ship, the ''Relentless'', was Captained by Imperial captain [[Dorja]]. This ship too, along with the ''Judicator'', saw action at the Battle of Endor. The ''Relentless'' was first part of the battle over New Cov tangling with three of Bel Iblis's dreadnaught cruisers. Later, it would assist in the diversionary attacks necessary to take Ukio. The ship's final appearance was at the Battle of Bilbringi, where the Thrawn campaign came to an end. ===''Victory''-class Star Destroyers=== Two ''Victory''-class Star Destroyers were a part of Thrawn's fleet, neither seeing much action under Thrawn. The [[Adamant (Victory-class)|''Adamant'']], the first of the two, was dispatched to the planet [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] to intercept Mara Jade. It saw very little combat under Thrawn, however remained as a part of the fleet. ===''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyers=== Three ''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyers were a part of Thrawn's fleet, none of them being a part of Thrawn's personal Armada. Commanded by Imperial [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Dezon]], the [[Constrainer/Legends|''Constrainer'']] was first used in Thrawn's first attempt to capture Luke Skywalker, who he felt was a vital part of the New Republic. This attack was unsuccessful, however the ''Constrainer'' saw action again in the attempt to capture Talon Karrde on Myrkr, however was unsuccessful in that venture too. The final battle the ''Constrainer'' participated in was the Battle of Bilbringi, and the defeat of Thrawn's fleet. The second ''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyer was the [[Rampart (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Rampart'']], a cruiser in the Imperial Navy. The third, and final, was the [[Sentinel (Interdictor cruiser)|''Sentinel'']], which participated too in the Battle of Bilbringi. ==Organization== The armada was mainly used by the Grand Admiral as a personal flying column for planetary conquests and long-range strikes, as at the planets Sluis Van or [[Ukio/Legends|Ukio]], which could also combine with other forces in campaign warfare, and serve as the centrepiece of larger fleet formations for major set-piece battles. [[File:ThrawnsArmadaOrganization-HttESourcebook.jpg|thumb|right|Thrawn's Armada organization.]] All in all, Thrawn's armada can perhaps be compared for its size and significance to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Death Squadron/Legends|Death Squadron]]—albeit without a [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] command ship. His amassed fleet was noted as being only a small portion of the Empire's once unimaginably vast war fleet, which made its great success against the New Republic all the more astounding. Nevertheless, many details still remain unclear. Even the armada's operational designation is unknown, and while the ''Chimaera'' had apparently been serving for the previous five years as a command ship for the remnants of the fleet deployed at Endor, it is uncertain what relationship this armada bore to that once-larger formation; [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Brandei]] of the ''Judicator'' was likewise a veteran of Endor, but during the intervening years, at least one of the Star Destroyers in the squadron, [[Inexorable (Imperial I-class)|''Inexorable'']], had apparently been serving with the Grand Admiral in the Unknown Regions. Needless to say, Thrawn's front-line fleet was not limited to a half-dozen Star Destroyers. Other [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] and [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] are known to have operated in direct support of the armada, and as tactics required, the ships of the armada could be intermingled with additional forces. For example, in a series of synchronized strikes against planets near Sluis Van, in the preliminaries to the assault on the shipyard described above, the ships of the armada were grouped with other Star Destroyers and then temporarily reorganized into three battlegroups of four, with each Star Destroyer being escorted by a dedicated task force of approximately five smaller ships. ===Naval=== [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]],''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]],''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]], [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-medium class cruisers]], [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruisers]], [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigates]]. [[Star Galleon-class frigate|''Star Galleon''-class frigates]] and [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Interdictor''-class Star Destroyers]] served as primary [[Warship/Legends|warships]] for the fleet. After the [[Battle for the Katana fleet|Battle for the ''Katana'' fleet]], [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] (179) were added to the fleet. At least four [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun|Golan II Space Defense Platforms]] were used by the fleet. More could have been used as well. Thrawn did at least have another one the was equipped with [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking technology]]. Thrawn was able to have access to three starship manufacturing facilities, these included; [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]] [[Yaga Minor shipyards/Legends|shipyards]], [[Ord Trasi/Legends|Ord Trasi]] [[Ord Trasi shipyards|shipyards]], and [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]] [[Bilbringi shipyards|shipyards]]. [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]] were the primary [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] used by the fleet. [[Scimitar assault bomber]]s would later be used in the fleet. [[F7 "Landing Brick" Drop-Ship]]s would be used notably, along side [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]], [[Gamma-class assault shuttle/Legends|''Gamma''-class assault shuttles]], [[Beta-class assault shuttle|''Beta''-class assault shuttles]] and various other forms of [[Assault shuttle/Legends|assault shuttles]]. [[Imperial Navy Trooper/Legends|Imperial Naval troopers]] would be used as well, notably guarding, maintaining military bases, and [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]]. The [[181st Imperial Fighter Wing/Legends|181st Imperial Fighter Wing]], [[Black Wing Squadron]], [[Cloak Force]], and [[Scimitar assault wing]] served within the armada, with the 181st Wing and Black Wing serving at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilibringi]].[[Battle of Endor/Legends|]][[Death/Legends|The Essential Guide to Warfare]] ===Army=== With Thrawn being [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]], Thrawn was able to gather up a large armed force of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]], [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]], and [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|All Terrain Personal Transports]] served as primary [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] for the fleet. [[LAVr QH-7 Chariot]]s, [[HAVr A9 Floating Fortress/Legends|HAVr A9 Floating Fortresses]], and [[Swift Assault 5]]s, [[PX-4 Mobile Command Base]]s, [[S-1 FireHawke Heavy Repulsortank]]s, [[Imperial-class 1-H repulsortank/Legends|''Imperial''-class 1-H Repulsortanks]], [[HAVw A5 Juggernaut]]s, [[Repulsor scout|Repulsor Scouts]], and [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]], and [[Stormtrooper transport (Trogan)|armored transport carriers]] were also used. [[Imperial Army trooper/Legends|Imperial Army troopers]] would be used to guard [[Planet/Legends|planets]] underneath Thrawn's control. With Thrawn commanding the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]], he was able to command the remnants of the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] during his campaign. [[Storm commando/Legends|Storm commandos]], alongside [[Noghri Death Commando]]s were used on specialized missions.''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]], [[Land assault trooper]]s and [[Scout trooper/Legends|Biker Scouts]] were used for conquests, and guarding planets. During the [[Battle of Sluis Van|attack]] on the [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]] [[Sluis Van Shipyards|Shipyards]], [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|Zero-G Assault Stormtroopers]] were used to board the [[Battleship/Legends|battleships]]. [[Radiation zone assault trooper]]s were used to attack the radioactive surface of [[Qat Chrystac/Legends|Qat Chrystac]].''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' ===Intelligence=== Although [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] was disbanded, with the supposed death of [[Director of Imperial Intelligence]] [[Ysanne Isard]], Imperial Intelligence still existed, and was used heavily by Thrawn. [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Molo Himron]] was handpicked by Thrawn to go to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with his [[Imperial commando/Legends|Imperial commandos]] to [[Raid on Coruscant (Thrawn Crisis)|capture]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] [[Solo twins|twins]]. Their secondary objective was to neutralize [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] who [[Treason/Legends|defected]] to the New Republic. Before Thrawn began striking at New Republic bases, Thrawn learned of [[Delta Source]], an audio intelligence recording devices installed within the trees in the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. ===Weapons=== After discovering [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]], Thrawn made use of the [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking technology]], and [[spaarti cloning cylinder]]s. The cloning cylinders made use for building up Thrawn's army, since his fleet was short on [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. The cloaking devices at Thrawn's disposal were used heavily, at least several [[Starship/Legends|starships]] were cloaked, and Thrawn would use the cloaks on [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] in order to use them as a siege weapon for his [[Siege of Coruscant|retaking of]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During the Thrawn Crisis, Thrawn's fleet utilized several [[Siege platform/Legends|siege platforms]] stationed above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qat Chrystac/Legends|Qat Chrystac]]. It deployed [[Radiation zone assault trooper|Imperial Radiation Troopers]] down below the planet's surface in order to destroy the secret New Republic base. [[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Spheres]] were used within the fleet. During the [[Battle of Woostri]], Thrawn used [[Attack cruiser/Legends|attack cruisers]] with cloaking devices to do a surprise attack on the planet. At the [[Shipyard/Legends|Imperial shipyards]] in the Bilbringi [[Bilbringi system/Legends|system]], a [[crystal gravfield trap]] was kept there by Thrawn. [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|Shield barriers]] were also kept there as well for defense purposes. [[Ysalamiri/Legends|Ysalamir]] was used heavily by Thrawn's forces to combat [[Force-sensitive/Legends|force-sensitives]]. During the [[Raid on Nomad City]], [[Plasma-Jet Mole Miner]]s (51) were stolen, they would be used to hijack [[New Republic]] ships at the [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]] [[Shipyard/Legends|Shipyards]]. ==Known officers== *Grand Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] *Captain [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] *General [[Freja Covell]] *Captain [[Aban]] *Captain [[Brandei]] *Captain [[Harbid]] *Captain [[Dorja]] *Stormtrooper Colonel [[TC-1289]] *Lieutenant [[Dezon]] *Lieutenant [[Tschel]] *Ensign [[Rejlii Mithel]] {{IncompleteList}} [[File:Thrawn_fleet_XwA.jpg|thumb|200px|"Thrawn's fleet" before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] (from left to right: [[Stormhawk (Imperial I-class)|''Stormhawk'']], [[Inexorable (Imperial I-class)|''Inexorable'']], [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] and ''[[Nemesis]]'').]] ==Behind the scenes== The [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] along with [[Inexorable (Imperial I-class)|''Inexorable'']], ''[[Death's Head]]'', [[Stormhawk (Imperial I-class)|''Stormhawk'']] and ''[[Nemesis]]'' appear together in mission 6:2 of ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} *''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *{{FactFile|5|THR 1-4|Grand Admiral Thrawn}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *{{CSWECite|I|138|''Constrainer''}} {{1stID|Thrawn's fleet}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Thrawns Armada |es=Flota de Thrawn (Imperio Galáctico) |pl=Armada Thrawna }} [[Category:Imperial fleets]] [[Category:Thrawn's confederation units]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Thrawn's fleet]] }}
